title: Emerald Kit
description: Emerald Mod Kit: Looking to complete your Minecraft armor and tool set? This mod adds a practical use for emeralds, letting you craft gear to match the rest of your collection. A simple and seamless addition for fans of the vanilla experience!
body:
Emerald Mod Kit

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c29d7cfbbea54d1a99b91b7460d6ccc959cf6d94.jpeg)

Looking to complete your Minecraft armor and tool set? This mod adds a practical use for emeralds, letting you craft gear to match the rest of your collection. A simple and seamless addition for fans of the vanilla experience!

Let me know if you'd like any tweaks!
